title: corybas matthewsii
intro: Corybas matthewsii, also known as the Australian orchid or matthewsii spider orchid, is a terrestrial orchid native to Australia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of various flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Corybas matthewsii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
